description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, featuring a smooth curved surface for skating and a flat central platform. The ramp is constructed from wood panels and reinforced with metal railings along the top edges for safety. Graffiti and colorful tags are scattered across the surfaces, adding an urban, well-used aesthetic. One side of the ramp includes a tall stairway with a platform, providing access to the upper edge. The structure is open underneath the central platform, allowing for visibility and airflow. The overall design is robust and intended for skateboarding, BMX, or similar activities in a public park or urban playground.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal railings, graffiti, and a stairway platform, designed for urban playground use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height of the half-pipe, the stairway, and prominent graffiti on the ramp's surface.
description_view_1: Angled view into the ramp's bowl, highlighting the curved skating surface, graffiti, and the stairway platform on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the ramp, the open space beneath the platform, and additional graffiti on the structure.
description_view_3: Front view into the half-pipe, displaying the full skating area, metal railings, and the stairway platform to the left.
